title: An autonomous modality of RNA degradation using small bifunctional molecules
author: Gonçalo, Bernardes
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This dataset contains input files and representative trajectory snapshots from molecular dynamics (MD) simulations of the c-Myc PINAD bound to an RNA G-quadruplex (rG4)
steps_raw: This dataset contains input files and representative trajectory snapshots from molecular dynamics (MD) simulations of the c-Myc PINAD bound to an RNA G-quadruplex (rG4)
